case_title: MAE S. JESENA VS. WALTER DABNEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ NOT STATED - SERVED JUL-21-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EPS INC DBA EXPRESS PLUMBING UNDERGROUND CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MAE S. JESENA AND DEFENDANT WALTER DABNEY, WHO IS APPEARING FOR HIMSELF AND AS MANAGER FOR ENTITY DEFENDANT EPS INC., D/B/A EXPRESS PLUMBING UNDER CONSTRUCTION. KENNETH HENSON, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. ORDER WAIVING PLAINTIFF'S COURT FEES & COSTS FILED JULY 17, 2017. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JESENA, MAE S. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EPS INC DBA EXPRESS PLUMBING UNDERGROUND CONSTRUCTION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JESENA, MAE S. AS TO DEFENDANT DABNEY, WALTER EPS INC DBA EXPRESS PLUMBING UNDERGROUND CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JESENA, MAE S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DABNEY, WALTER EPS INC DBA EXPRESS PLUMBING UNDERGROUND CONSTRUCTION $3,528.55 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,528.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JESENA, MAE S. AS TO DEFENDANT EPS INC DBA EXPRESS PLUMBING UNDERGROUND CONSTRUCTION
